name: cityline-platform
description: Monorepo do CityLine com frontend Next.js e backend Express para mobilidade urbana

scripts.dev: npm run dev:clean && npm run dev:prepare-db && npm run dev:up
scripts.dev:up: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @cityline/shared && npm run build --workspace @cityline/backend && npm run build --workspace @cityline/frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @cityline/backend && npm run lint --workspace @cityline/frontend
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check --workspace @cityline/shared && npm run type-check --workspace @cityline/backend && npm run type-check --workspace @cityline/frontend
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @cityline/backend && npm run test --workspace @cityline/frontend
